scripts.repomix:app: tree -I "node_modules|.git|.next|dist|build|.turbo|coverage|public|migrations|snippets|test_output.txt" > project-tree.txt && repomix -c repomix-app.config.json && rm project-tree.txt
scripts.repomix:ext: tree -I "node_modules|.git|.next|dist|build|.turbo|coverage|public|migrations|snippets|test_output.txt" > project-tree.txt && repomix -c repomix-ext.config.json && rm project-tree.txt
